name: vexpo
description: The all-in-one starting point for shipping a real Expo app. Native SwiftUI, Convex, Better Auth, Resend, EAS top-to-bottom.
author: Ramon Claudio <hello@ramonclaudio.com> (https://github.com/ramonclaudio)

scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run knip && npm run test:packages
scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run template:test
scripts.test:packages:e2e: npm run test:e2e -w @ramonclaudio/vexpo && npm run test:create:e2e
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:packages:e2e
scripts.link:dev:
npm run build -w @ramonclaudio/vexpo && cd packages/vexpo && npm link && cd ../../templates/default && npm link @ramonclaudio/vexpo && echo '
linked. now `npm run setup` from templates/default routes to the local vexpo build.
run `npm run build -w @ramonclaudio/vexpo` whenever you change cli source.
'
